privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for talon_env create_vin_validator_voice task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the required dataset (nhtsa_vins.csv) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely. The target directory structure requirements and expected output file paths match the prompt description.
